title: Money
description: Common v1 monetary value placeholder for future API and event contracts.
$comment: TODO: Phase 1 source documents do not define currency policy, rounding, precision, or minor-unit rules. Fields are intentionally optional until a source document defines the concrete money contract.

amount.description: Decimal monetary amount represented as a string to avoid binary floating point issues. TODO: define precision and scale from a source document.

currencyCode.description: ISO-like three-letter currency code. TODO: source documents have not defined the allowed currency set.
